acceptance_criteria.description: Legacy demos receive additive sealed outer manifests and complete authority replay retention without changing frozen inner replay bytes.
Missing terminal-failure, multi-leg authority, Live Labyrinth, and solo multi-action replay evidence gaps are closed or explicitly documented as unrecoverable.
Legacy game internals migrate incrementally behind compatibility facades with per-feature verification and rollback evidence.

compatibility: Preserve old package hashes, game IDs, source-fingerprint-v1 behavior, replay bytes, and public identifiers.
migration: Split each legacy migration into a separately claimed descendant feature before editing implementation internals.
privacy: Protected authority and live-provider artifacts remain private even when retention gaps are closed.
rollback: Every descendant migration includes an independently reversible compatibility boundary.

in: Source-fingerprint v1 retention and v2 adoption
out: Treating historical plans as proof of implementation

summary: Incrementally normalize historical demos and migrate legacy WorldArena internals only after the new repository, replay, and compatibility foundations are proven.
title: Legacy demo and game-internal migrations
